Discover
Est. XVI Century
The Estate

A Catalan Treasure,
Exclusively Yours

Ses Garites is one of the most extraordinary historic estates on the Costa Brava — a 16th-century Catalan manor set in the medieval village of Pals, moments from the Mediterranean. With original stone vaulted ceilings, exposed wooden beams, and terracotta floors that have stood for over 500 years, the estate offers an unrivalled backdrop for weddings, private retreats, and exclusive gatherings.

The entire estate is available only as a whole — never shared, never divided. Your event, your home, your story.

6 Bedrooms & Bathrooms
16 Guests Maximum
500+ Years of History
300m From the Beach
Exclusive Experiences

The Estate is Yours
for Every Occasion

💍

Weddings

Exchange vows beneath 500-year-old stone vaults. Dine by candlelight in the medieval dining hall. Dance in the grand salon. Ses Garites provides an unforgettable setting for a wedding your guests will cherish forever.

Ceremony Space Vaulted Dining Garden Terrace Up to 16 Overnight
🧘

Retreats

Disconnect from the world in one of Catalonia's most secluded historic estates. Yoga in the garden, meditation in the library lounge, evenings around the fireplace. Space, silence, and beauty in abundance.

Pool & Grounds Library Lounge Countryside Views Complete Privacy
🎉

Celebrations

Milestone birthdays, anniversaries, family gatherings, corporate retreats — Ses Garites is the rare venue that makes every event feel truly exceptional. Hire the whole estate and make it entirely your own.

Full Exclusivity Event Coordination Catering Available Private Chef

Where We Are

Pals, Costa Brava

Ses Garites sits within the medieval walls of Pals, one of the best-preserved villages in Catalonia — surrounded by pine forests, open meadows, and minutes from the Mediterranean coast.

🏖
Platja de Pals
~5 min drive · Fine sand · Calm Mediterranean water · Windsurfing & water sports
🏰
Medieval Village of Pals
Walking distance · Restaurants · Artisan shops · Gothic architecture
🌿
Aiguamolls Natural Park
~10 min drive · Cycling · Hiking · Birdwatching · Unspoilt nature
✈️
Getting Here
Girona Airport ~35 min · Barcelona El Prat ~1h 30 min · Excellent road links
🍽
Dining & Culture
Girona · Begur · Palafrugell all within 20 min · Michelin-starred restaurants nearby
Investment

Pricing & Packages

Ses Garites is available for exclusive hire only — the entire estate, never by the room. All prices are for the whole estate per night.

Low Season
October – March
€900
per night · whole estate
  • Minimum 3 nights
  • All 6 bedrooms & bathrooms
  • Pool, gardens & all spaces
  • Welcome hamper included
  • WiFi & private parking
Most Popular
Mid Season
April – June · September
€1,000
per night · whole estate
  • Minimum 3 nights
  • All 6 bedrooms & bathrooms
  • Full estate exclusive use
  • Weekly housekeeping
  • Welcome wine & local produce
  • Housekeeping included
High Season
July – August
€1,200
per night · whole estate
  • Minimum 7 nights
  • All 6 bedrooms & bathrooms
  • Full estate exclusive use
  • Weekly housekeeping
  • Welcome wine & local produce
  • Event support available

Special Packages

💍 Wedding Package
Friday to Sunday exclusive hire. Ceremony space, vaulted dining hall, garden terrace, full estate for up to 16 overnight guests. Event coordination support available.
From €4,500 / 3-night weekend
🌿 Full Week Exclusive
Sunday to Sunday. The most popular choice for destination weddings, full retreats and multi-day celebrations. Private chef available at additional cost.
From €6,800 / 7 nights
